stages.concept:
# Unit 048: 과거완료 / 과거완료 진행형 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **과거완료**와 **과거완료 진행형**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> The concert **had** already **begun** when we arrived.
> 우리가 도착했을 때, 그 콘서트는 이미 시작했다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **과거완료**는 과거의 어느 시점을 기준으로, 그 **이전**에 일어난 일이 과거의 그 시점까지 영향을 미치는 경우에 사용해요. **had + p.p.** 형태예요.

**Q. 다음 중 영어로 표현할 때 과거완료가 포함된 문장을 고르세요.**
1. 나는 지금까지 콘서트장에 두 번 가본 적이 있다.
2. 우리가 도착했을 때, 그 콘서트는 이미 시작했다. ✅

👩‍🏫 선생님: 예문을 살펴볼까요?

> We **had lived** in Paris before we moved to New York.
> 우리가 뉴욕으로 이주하기 전에 파리에서 살았었다.

> My brother **had visited** the U.S. twice before he entered the university.
> 내 남동생은 대학에 입학하기 전에 두 번 미국에 방문했었다.

> I **had lost** my laptop, so I had to buy a new one.
> 나는 내 노트북을 잃어버려서 새 것을 사야 했다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **과거완료 진행형**은 과거 이전에 시작한 일이 과거의 어느 시점까지 **진행되고 있던** 상황을 나타내요. **had + been + 동사원형-ing** 형태예요.

> I **had been playing** soccer for hours when my mother called.
> 엄마가 전화했을 때 나는 몇 시간 동안 축구를 하고 있었다.

> She **had been cooking** dinner when her family arrived.
> 그녀의 가족이 도착했을 때, 그녀는 저녁 식사를 만들고 있었다.

> He **had been crying** loudly all morning when I met him.
> 내가 그를 만났을 때, 그는 아침 내내 큰 소리로 울고 있었다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 과거완료(had + p.p.)는 대과거, 과거완료 진행형(had been + -ing)은 대과거부터 계속 진행 중이던 일! 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 048: 과거완료 과거완료 진행형 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
When I came home, my sister (     ) dinner for us.
> **정답** had made

---

**02.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
He (     ) his wallet before he left the house.
> **정답** had lost

---

**03.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
By the time she arrived, the movie (     ) .
> **정답** had started

---

**04.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
They (     ) for two hours before the bus came.
> **정답** had been waiting

---

**05.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
She (     ) all day, so she was very tired.
> **정답** had been working

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I had ate breakfast before going to school.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** ate → eaten

---

**07.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She has finished her project before the deadline.
(과거완료 문맥)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** has → had

---

**08.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
He had been play the guitar for hours.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** play → playing

---

**09.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
They had went home before the rain started.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** went → gone

---

**10.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
We had been study for two hours before the test.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** study → studying

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
내가 도착했을 때 그녀는 이미 떠난 후였다.
She already when I arrived.
> **정답** had, left

---

**12.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그는 시험 전에 열심히 공부해 왔다.
He hard before the exam.
> **정답** had been studying

---

**13.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
우리가 극장에 도착했을 때 영화는 이미 시작했었다.
The movie already when we arrived at the theater.
> **정답** had, started

---

**14.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그녀가 올 때까지 나는 한 시간 동안 기다리고 있었다.
I for an hour until she came.
> **정답** had been waiting

---

**15.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
아빠가 오시기 전에 나는 숙제를 다 끝냈었다.
I my homework before my dad came.
> **정답** had finished

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
그녀가 전화했을 때 나는 이미 잠들어 있었다.
had I already fallen asleep when she called
> **정답** I / had / already / fallen / asleep / when / she / called

---

**17.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
그는 시험 전에 세 시간 동안 공부하고 있었다.
had He for been studying three hours before the test
> **정답** He / had / been / studying / for / three / hours / before / the / test

---

**18.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
내가 가게에 갔을 때 빵은 이미 다 팔렸었다.
had been The bread sold already when I went to the store
> **정답** The / bread / had / already / been / sold / when / I / went / to / the / store

---

**19.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
비가 오기 전에 우리는 경기를 끝냈었다.
had We the game finished before it rained
> **정답** We / had / finished / the / game / before / it / rained

---

**20.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
그녀는 점심을 먹기 전에 한 시간 동안 운동하고 있었다.
She had been for exercising an hour before lunch
> **정답** She / had / been / exercising / for / an / hour / before / lunch
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 048: 과거완료  과거완료 진행형 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Amy __________ my friend for five years before she
moved abroad.
had been
is
has been
have been
> **정답** had been

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
When I played with her, she __________ her
homework.
has already finished
had already finish
had already finished
already finishes
> **정답** had already finished

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
The teacher ___________ a roll before she started
English class.
had been calling
is calling
calls
has been calling
• call a roll 출석을 부르다
> **정답** had been calling

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Tom ________________ his favorite computer game
for hours when his mom entered his room. He
_______________ computer games all morning when
her mom told him to stop playing them. His mom was
very upset.
plays
has been playing
had been playing
played
> **정답** had been playing

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
She couldn't sleep because she __________ a horror
movie in the evening.
Tom ____________ to India for a month before he
entered college.
had watched - had traveled
had watch - had travel
watches - travels
has watched - has traveled
> **정답** had watched - had traveled

---

**06.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Amy __________ pictures of food before she ate
food.
She __________ pictures on her blog before she went
to bed.
takes - posts
had taken - had posted
has taken - has posted
have taken - have posted
> **정답** had taken - had posted

---

**07.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
The water ______________ over when Tom entered
the kitchen.
She ______________ dinner when her family arrived.
had been boiling - had been cooking
is boiling - is cooking
has been boiling - has been cooking
has boiled - has cooked
> **정답** had been boiling - had been cooking

---

**08.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그는 공부를 시작하기 전에 책상을 정리했다.
He had organized his desk before he started
studying.
He organizes his desk before he started
studying.
He had organized his desk before he starts
studying.
He has organized his desk before he started
studying.
> **정답** He had organized his desk before he started
studying.

---

**09.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 자동차 연료가 떨어지기 전에 가득 채워 넣었다.
Tom filled up the car before it ran out of fuel.
Tom had filled up the car before it ran out of
fuel.
Tom fills up the car before it runs out of fuel.
Tom has filled up the car before it ran out of
fuel.
> **정답** Tom had filled up the car before it ran out of fuel.

---

**10.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
우리가 집에 도착했을 때, 엄마는 하루 종일 요리를 하던
중이였다.
My mom had cooked all day when we arrived
at home.
My mom had been cooking all day when we
arrived at home.
My mom has been cooking all day when we
arrived at home.
My mom cooks all day when we arrives at
home.
> **정답** My mom had been cooking all day when we arrived
at home.

---

**11.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
Amy searches the Internet for cold symptoms before
she saw a doctor.
search
has search
had searched
has been searching
• cold symptoms 감기증상
> **정답** had searched

---

**12.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
Dad has been cooking dinner when mom came home.
is cooking
cooks
was cooking
had been cooking
> **정답** had been cooking

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 옳은 것을 고르시오.
They have learned about insects before they
collected them.
We had been playing cards for three hours
when she arrived at home.
The cat has cried out until I fed it.
Tom has lost his glasses, so he had to buy
new ones.
> **정답** We had been playing cards for three hours when she
arrived at home.

---

**14.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
When I found the puppy, it has shivering with cold.
had been shivering
has been shivering
had shivering
is shivering
• shiver 몸을 떨다
> **정답** had been shivering

---

**15.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
He had searched for characters before he
watched the drama.
The train has left when the boys arrived at the
station.
I remembered that I had left my bag at
Amy's house.
Tom had been a teacher before he became a
singer.
> **정답** The train has left when the boys arrived at the
station.

---

**16.** 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
Tom and I had met several times in the
secret cabin before I moved out. It
was an abandoned house. We
read books there until the sun set.
> **정답** had met, moved, was, had read

---

**17.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
Tom has washed out the tool before he
used it.
> **정답** had washed

---

**18.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
Amy finishes her homework before she
read comic books.
> **정답** had finished

---

**19.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
He is crying loudly all
morning when I met him.
> **정답** had been crying

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
He has left the cafe when I got there.
They have lived in Korea since I met them.
She goes to church every Sunday.
He had studied for three hours before his
mom came home.
> **정답** He has left the cafe when I got there.
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 048 과거완료  과거완료 진행형중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그는 동물원에서 일하기 전부터 환경단체에서 일했었다.
힌트 (     ) work for
He  (     )   (     )   (     )  an environmental
organization before he worked at a zoo.
정답 had, worked, for

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
수학 선생님은 수업을 시작하기 전에 숙제 검사를 했다.
힌트 (     ) check
The math teacher  (     )   (     )  the homework
before she started the class.
정답 had, checked

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 빈 칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
나는 비가 오기 전에 빨래를 거의 다 널지 못했다.
힌트 (     ) hardly, hang out
I  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  the laundry when it
started to rain.
• hang out 널어놓다
정답 had, hardly, hung, out

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그녀는 영화를 보기 전 팝콘과 콜라를 이미 사 두었다.
힌트 (     ) already, buy
She  (     )   (     )   (     )  popcorn and coke before
they watched the movie.
정답 had, already, bought

---

**05.** 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
wear the pants
A: Did you see the pants he wore? They were cool.
B: He  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  by the time they
became fashionable.
정답 had, worn, the, pants

---

**06.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
find, an engine failure
A: What's going on? The plane took off late.
B: They  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  before
the plane took off.
• take off 이륙하다
정답 had, found, an, engine, failure

---

**07.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오. (과거완료진행형으로 쓸 것)
do her homework
A: What had she done before the party was held?
B: She  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  at home before
the party was held.
정답 had, done, her, homework

---

**08.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 나타낼 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오.
I made a bed.
Then I had a breakfast.
I  (     )   (     )  a bed before I  (     )  a breakfast.
• make a bed 침대를 정리하다
정답 had, made, had

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 빈 칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
내가 그의 집에 들어갔을 때, 그는 그의 집을 이미 청소했었
다. [clean, enter]
He  (     )  already  (     )  his house when I 
his house.
정답 had, cleaned, entered

---

**10.** 우리말에 맞게 빈 칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
우리가 경기장에 도착했을 때, 야구 경기는 이미 시작한 뒤
였다. [start, arrive]
The baseball game  (     )  already  (     )  when we
 at the stadium.
정답 had, started, arrived

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 048: 과거완료  과거완료 진행형 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Amy __________ my classmate for three years before she moved away. had been is has been have been
> 정답: had been

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
When I talked to her, she __________ her project. has already finished had already finish had already finished already finishes
> 정답: had already finished

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
The coach ___________ names before he started the practice. had been calling is calling calls has been calling
> 정답: had been calling

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Tom ________________ his favorite video game for hours when his dad entered his room.
He _______________ video games all morning when his dad told him to stop playing them.
His dad was very upset. plays has been playing had been playing played
> 정답: had been playing

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
She couldn't sleep because she __________ a scary story in the evening.
Jake ____________ to China for a month before he started high school. had watched - had traveled had watch - had travel watches - travels has watched - has traveled
> 정답: had watched - had traveled

---

**06.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Mina __________ photos of flowers before she left the garden.
She __________ photos on her blog before she went to sleep. takes - posts had taken - had posted has taken - has posted have taken - have posted
> 정답: had taken - had posted

---

**07.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The soup ______________ over when Jake entered the kitchen.
